title: Save locked view settings when you duplicate a board
excerpt:

posts.author: Sarahtut14 (Sarah Tuthill)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It is important that the permissions on our board are set to "Only Edit Content"so people can add new rows to the board but cannot edit the structure of the board. However we do not want board members editing board views. Currently the permissions are pre set to allowing members to edit board views when the permissions are set to “Only Edit Content.”

We are able to go through each view and lock each view however when you duplicate the board you have to go in and lock each view again. It would be great if the locked view settings saved when you duplicate a board. We are wasting a lot of time going in and locking all the views on all our boards.

What are you trying to achieve

Trying to save time by not having to individually lock each view on every new board.
